examples: Other types of spondylolisthesis and surgical treatments will not be discussed.
Asymmetrical slip of the facets results in a rotational component to the spondylolisthesis.
Degenerative spondylolisthesis is the result of longstanding intersegmental instability at the lumbar motion segment.
